title: CommandSessionAdapter Secondary Adapter

steps.description: Define domain model and value objects related to command sessions.
steps.done_condition: Domain model and value objects for command sessions are implemented and reviewed.
Ports are defined and correctly specify the contract for the CommandSessionAdapter.

steps.description: Implement CommandSessionAdapter as a secondary adapter to manage command sessions.
steps.done_condition: CommandSessionAdapter is implemented and passes all unit tests.
All unit tests for CommandSessionAdapter are implemented and passing.

steps.description: Integrate CommandSessionAdapter with existing use cases.
steps.done_condition: Use cases have been updated to utilize CommandSessionAdapter appropriately.

steps.description: Write integration tests to validate the use of CommandSessionAdapter in the application context.
steps.done_condition: Integration tests confirm that CommandSessionAdapter works correctly with existing functionality.

riskRegister.mitigation: Ensure clear documentation and maintain modular design.
riskRegister.risk: Increased complexity due to additional adapter layer.

successCriteria: Code is reviewed and meets quality standards.
Unit and integration tests are passing.
CommandSessionAdapter is successfully integrated with the application.
